spec.query:
from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_speed_kmh" or r["_field"] == "wind_gust_kmh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_wm2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "uv")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rain_day_mm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp_out_c")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "press_rel_hpa")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_speed_kmh")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rain_rate_mm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "solar_wm2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "hum_out")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>   r["_field"] == "rain_event_mm"	or   r["_field"] == "rain_hour_mm"		or   r["_field"] == "rain_24h_mm"		or   r["_field"] == "rain_day_mm"		or   r["_field"] == "rain_week_mm"		or   r["_field"] == "rain_month_mm"		or   r["_field"] == "rain_year_mm"		)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_dir_avg10m")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_dir_avg10m")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp_out_c")
  |> max() // Sucht den EINEN höchsten Wert im gesamten Zeitraum
  |> yield(name: "max_temp")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp_out_c")
  |> min() // Sucht den EINEN niedrigsten Wert im gesamten Zeitraum
  |> yield(name: "min_temp")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_speed_kmh")
  |> max() // Sucht den EINEN höchsten Wert im gesamten Zeitraum
  |> yield(name: "max_wind")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_gust_kmh")
  |> max() // Sucht den EINEN höchsten Wert im gesamten Zeitraum
  |> yield(name: "max_gust")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "wind_bft")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "press_rel_hpa")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp_in_c" or r["_field"] == "hum_in")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "wetterstation")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "weather_station")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp_out_c" or r["_field"] == "hum_out")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
